description: Drop 23 unnecessary indexes and FK constraints on patientsample table to reduce lock contention and deadlocks
author: Dr M H B Ariyaratne
preRequisites: Ensure no heavy lab operations during migration
This migration drops FK constraints and indexes - JPA/EclipseLink handles referential integrity at application level

migrationSteps.description: Pre-migration analysis - count indexes and table size
Drop 16 FK constraints and indexes for 100% NULL columns (cardinality 1)
Drop 7 FK constraints and indexes for low-cardinality columns never used in queries
Post-migration verification - confirm index count reduced and table size decreased

expectedOutcome.primaryFix: Reduce patientsample index overhead from ~142MB (39 indexes) to ~60MB (16 indexes), significantly reducing lock contention during bulk edit() operations
expectedOutcome.impact: Faster writes on patientsample table, reduced deadlock probability during concurrent lab sample processing

rollbackNotes: Rollback script re-creates all 23 FK constraints and their indexes
No data loss from this migration - only index/constraint metadata changes
relatedIssue: #19399 - Optimize PatientSample bulk operations to prevent DB deadlocks and lock contention
